classes.name: MiniMaxRMSNorm
classes.rationale: Inherits MixtralRMSNorm -> MistralRMSNorm -> LlamaRMSNorm; standard RMSNorm. Verified L1/rms_norm.py implements weight*rsqrt(mean(x^2)+eps)*x

classes.name: MiniMaxLightningAttention
classes.rationale: Linear (decay/blockwise) attention with own K.T@V running cache and per-block decay factors; not the standard flash/SDPA path. No kb-nano file implements this lightning-attention block compute pattern (closest analogues are gla_attention/retnet_attention but with different decay/state semantics)

classes.name: MiniMaxRotaryEmbedding
classes.rationale: Standard RoPE inv_freq table; used outside the attention class to produce (cos,sin). L1/rotary_emb.py covers the apply step used inside MiniMaxAttention

classes.name: MiniMaxAttention
classes.rationale: Inherits MixtralAttention=MistralAttention; q/k/v/o nn.Linear, RoPE, optional sliding_window. L2/attention.py:LlamaAttention covers QKV projection + RoPE + paged attention + o_proj

classes.name: MiniMaxTopKRouter
classes.rationale: F.linear(weight) -> softmax -> topk; in kb-nano this is fused into the MoE block, but the bare router compute is Linear + topk_softmax

classes.name: MiniMaxSparseMoeBlock
classes.rationale: Inherits MixtralSparseMoeBlock: gate -> topk -> per-expert SiLU(gate)*up -> down. L2/mixtral_moe.py:MixtralMoE implements this with fused grouped GEMM (Linear gate + TopKSoftmax + FusedExperts)

classes.name: MiniMaxDecoderLayer
classes.rationale: Wiring class: input_layernorm -> self_attn (full or lightning) -> alpha/beta residual -> post_attention_layernorm -> mlp (MoE) -> alpha/beta residual

classes.name: MiniMaxModel
classes.rationale: Wiring class: embed_tokens + layers + final RMSNorm + rotary_emb

classes.name: MiniMaxForCausalLM
classes.rationale: Wiring class with lm_head

classes.name: MiniMaxForSequenceClassification
classes.rationale: Wiring class with score head; composes only

classes.name: MiniMaxForTokenClassification
classes.rationale: Wiring class with token classifier head; composes only

classes.name: MiniMaxForQuestionAnswering
classes.rationale: Wiring class with QA outputs; composes only

classes.name: MistralMLP
classes.rationale: Standard SwiGLU MLP: gate_proj * silu(up_proj) -> down_proj. L2/llama_mlp.py uses MergedColumnParallelLinear (gate_up_proj) + SiluAndMul + RowParallelLinear, matching the fused form

classes.name: MistralAttention
classes.rationale: Standard Llama-style attention with optional sliding_window; L2/attention.py:LlamaAttention supports sliding_window kwarg and standard q/k/v/o projections + RoPE

classes.name: MistralDecoderLayer
classes.rationale: Wiring class: input_layernorm -> self_attn -> residual -> post_attention_layernorm -> mlp -> residual

classes.name: MistralModel
classes.rationale: Wiring class: embed_tokens + layers + final RMSNorm; composes only

classes.name: MistralForCausalLM
classes.rationale: Wiring class with lm_head; composes only

classes.name: MistralForTokenClassification
classes.rationale: Wiring class with token classifier; composes only

classes.name: MistralForSequenceClassification
classes.rationale: Wiring class with sequence classifier; composes only

classes.name: MistralForQuestionAnswering
classes.rationale: Wiring class with QA head; composes only

classes.name: Mistral3RMSNorm
classes.rationale: Inherits MistralRMSNorm; standard RMSNorm

classes.name: Mistral3PatchMerger
classes.rationale: Uses nn.functional.unfold to spatially merge patches then a single nn.Linear. L1/linear.py covers the linear; the unfold/permute is data-shuffling without a kb-nano kernel

classes.name: Mistral3MultiModalProjector
classes.rationale: RMSNorm -> patch_merger -> Linear -> ACT2FN -> Linear. Activation comes from L1/gelu.py or L1/silu.py at runtime; the parametric layers map to rms_norm + linear

classes.name: Mistral3CausalLMOutputWithPast
classes.rationale: Output dataclass; skip

classes.name: Mistral3ModelOutputWithPast
classes.rationale: Output dataclass; skip

classes.name: Mistral3Model
classes.rationale: Wiring class: vision_tower (Pixtral-style) + multi_modal_projector + language_model (Mistral)

classes.name: Mistral3ForConditionalGeneration
classes.rationale: Wiring class with lm_head over Mistral3Model; composes only

mistral_common.skip_reason: Folder mistral_common does not exist in /tmp/hf_transformers_pinned/src/transformers/models/. No source file to audit

classes.name: MixtralExperts
classes.rationale: Per-expert gate_up_proj + down_proj packed into 3D Parameter, looped via expert_mask. L2/mixtral_moe.py:MixtralMoE collapses gate+experts into a fused-grouped-GEMM kernel (FusedExperts) over identical w13/w2 layout

classes.name: MixtralTopKRouter
classes.rationale: F.linear -> softmax(float32) -> topk -> renormalize. L1/topk_softmax.py implements the fused topk-softmax used inside L2/mixtral_moe

classes.name: MixtralSparseMoeBlock
classes.rationale: Top-level MoE wrapping MixtralTopKRouter + MixtralExperts; L2/mixtral_moe.py is the canonical kb-nano implementation (gate Linear + TopKSoftmax + FusedExperts + AllReduce)

classes.name: MixtralRMSNorm
classes.rationale: Inherits MistralRMSNorm; standard RMSNorm

classes.name: MixtralRotaryEmbedding
classes.rationale: Standard Llama RoPE; cos/sin generation outside attention, applied via L1/rotary_emb.py

classes.name: MixtralAttention
classes.rationale: Inherits MistralAttention=LlamaAttention; same q/k/v/o + RoPE + sliding_window. L2/attention.py:LlamaAttention covers compute

classes.name: MixtralDecoderLayer
classes.rationale: Wiring class: input_layernorm -> self_attn -> post_attention_layernorm -> mlp(MoE) -> residual

classes.name: MixtralModel
classes.rationale: Wiring class: embed_tokens + layers + RMSNorm; composes only

classes.name: MixtralForCausalLM
classes.rationale: Wiring class with lm_head + aux loss

classes.name: MixtralForSequenceClassification
classes.rationale: Wiring class; composes only

classes.name: MixtralForTokenClassification
classes.rationale: Wiring class; composes only

classes.name: MixtralForQuestionAnswering
classes.rationale: Wiring class; composes only

classes.name: MllamaPrecomputedAspectRatioEmbedding
classes.rationale: nn.Embedding lookup over aspect_ratio_ids + reshape + optional gate*tanh. Compute is dominated by Embedding

classes.name: MllamaPrecomputedPositionEmbedding
classes.rationale: Learned position parameter + tile_embedding (nn.Embedding) with gated mixing; embedding lookup

classes.name: MllamaVisionMLP
classes.rationale: fc1 -> ACT2FN(gelu) -> fc2 (no SwiGLU); matches L2/encoder_mlp.py:EncoderIntermediate which is Linear + GELU (and EncoderOutput for the down-Linear). Could also map to L2/clip_mlp.py if quickgelu, but Mllama uses gelu

classes.name: MllamaVisionAttention
classes.rationale: Standard non-causal multi-head self-attention with separate q/k/v/o projections (no biases here). L2/clip_attention.py implements Q/K/V Linear + manual SDPA + out_proj; semantically equivalent (the bias=True/False of CLIP vs Mllama is parameterizable but interface matches)

classes.name: MllamaVisionEncoderLayer
classes.rationale: Wiring: layernorm -> self_attn -> gate_attn? -> residual -> layernorm -> mlp -> gate_ffn? -> residual

classes.name: MllamaVisionEncoder
classes.rationale: Wiring class: stack of MllamaVisionEncoderLayer; composes only

classes.name: MllamaTextRMSNorm
classes.rationale: Standard Llama RMSNorm (variance-only, no centering). L1/rms_norm.py matches

classes.name: MllamaTextCrossAttention
classes.rationale: Cross-attention with separate q/k/v/o, q_norm/k_norm RMSNorms, and KV cache. Closest kb-nano fit is L2/whisper_attention.py:WhisperCrossAttention which projects encoder K/V once into paged cache and reads on decode; Mllama adds q_norm/k_norm but the structural pattern (q_proj on text, kv_proj on image features cached, decode reads cache) matches

classes.name: MllamaTextSelfAttention
classes.rationale: Standard Llama causal self-attention with q/k/v/o, GQA, RoPE applied via apply_rotary_pos_emb. L2/attention.py:LlamaAttention covers

classes.name: MllamaTextMLP
classes.rationale: Standard SwiGLU: down_proj(act(gate_proj(x)) * up_proj(x)). L2/llama_mlp.py implements the fused MergedColumnParallel + SiluAndMul + RowParallel form

classes.name: MllamaSelfAttentionDecoderLayer
classes.rationale: Wiring class: input_layernorm -> self_attn -> residual -> post_attention_layernorm -> mlp -> residual

classes.name: MllamaCrossAttentionDecoderLayer
classes.rationale: Wiring class: input_layernorm -> cross_attn (gated tanh) -> residual -> post_attention_layernorm -> mlp (gated tanh) -> residual

classes.name: MllamaRotaryEmbedding
classes.rationale: Standard Llama-family RoPE (cos/sin precompute via inv_freq); L1/rotary_emb.py supplies the apply step

classes.name: MllamaVisionModel
classes.rationale: Wiring class: patch Conv2d + class embedding + position embeddings + transformer + global_transformer + layernorms

classes.name: MllamaTextModel
classes.rationale: Wiring class: embed_tokens + cross_attention_layers + self_attention_layers + RMSNorm; composes only

classes.name: MllamaForCausalLM
classes.rationale: Wiring class with lm_head; composes only

classes.name: MllamaModel
classes.rationale: Wiring class joining vision + text models with multi_modal_projector; composes only

classes.name: MllamaForConditionalGeneration
classes.rationale: Wiring class with lm_head; composes only

inheritance_summary: MllamaVisionAttention(nn.Module - non-causal MHA with separate q/k/v)

mlp_mixer.skip_reason: Folder mlp_mixer does not exist in /tmp/hf_transformers_pinned/src/transformers/models/. No source file to audit

classes.name: NoNorm
classes.rationale: Trivial elementwise affine: input * weight + bias; no kb-nano kernel for this elementwise affine. Could decompose to a tensor_ops elementwise multiply+add but no specialized file

classes.name: MobileBertEmbeddings
classes.rationale: Word + position + token_type embeddings + optional trigram conv-like cat + Linear + LayerNorm/NoNorm. Closest L2/encoder_embeddings.py:EncoderEmbeddingsBase covers BERT-style embedding + LayerNorm; the trigram conv-style cat and embedding_transformation Linear are extra and decompose to L1/embedding + L1/linear + L1/layer_norm

classes.name: MobileBertSelfAttention
classes.rationale: BERT-style non-causal MHA with separate q/k/v Linear, scaled-dot-product, no causal mask. L2/encoder_attention.py:EncoderSelfAttention matches (Q/K/V Linear + DenseAttention non-causal SDPA)

classes.name: MobileBertSelfOutput
classes.rationale: Linear + (optional dropout) + LayerNorm(out + residual). No exact L2 wrapper; decomposes to linear + layer_norm

classes.name: MobileBertAttention
classes.rationale: Wiring class around MobileBertSelfAttention + MobileBertSelfOutput

classes.name: MobileBertIntermediate
classes.rationale: Linear -> ACT2FN. L2/encoder_mlp.py:EncoderIntermediate matches (Linear+GELU); for non-gelu activations this is decomposed to L1/linear + L1/<act>

classes.name: OutputBottleneck
classes.rationale: Linear + LayerNorm(out + residual); decomposes to L1 ops

classes.name: MobileBertOutput
classes.rationale: Linear (intermediate->true_hidden) + LayerNorm + optional bottleneck; structurally matches encoder MLP output pattern

classes.name: BottleneckLayer
classes.rationale: Linear + LayerNorm; decomposes to L1 ops

classes.name: Bottleneck
classes.rationale: Wiring class composing BottleneckLayer instances; no own kernel

classes.name: FFNOutput
classes.rationale: Linear + LayerNorm(out + residual); decomposes to L1 ops

classes.name: FFNLayer
classes.rationale: Wiring class: MobileBertIntermediate + FFNOutput; composes only

classes.name: MobileBertLayer
classes.rationale: Wiring class: bottleneck + attention + ffn (multiple) + intermediate + output; composes only

classes.name: MobileBertEncoder
classes.rationale: Wiring: stack of MobileBertLayer; composes only

classes.name: MobileBertPooler
classes.rationale: First-token select + optional Linear + tanh. Trivial pool, no specialized kb-nano file

classes.name: MobileBertPredictionHeadTransform
classes.rationale: Linear -> ACT2FN -> LayerNorm; decomposes to L1 ops

classes.name: MobileBertLMPredictionHead
classes.rationale: Wiring around transform + decoder Linear; composes only

classes.name: MobileBertOnlyMLMHead
classes.rationale: Wiring class; composes only

classes.name: MobileBertPreTrainingHeads
classes.rationale: Wiring class for MLM + NSP heads; composes only

classes.name: MobileBertModel
classes.rationale: Wiring class: embeddings + encoder + pooler; composes only

classes.name: MobileBertForPreTraining
classes.rationale: Wiring class with classifier; composes only

classes.name: MobileBertForMaskedLM
classes.rationale: Wiring class with MLM head; composes only

classes.name: MobileBertOnlyNSPHead
classes.rationale: Single nn.Linear classifier

classes.name: MobileBertForNextSentencePrediction
classes.rationale: Wiring class; composes only

classes.name: MobileBertForSequenceClassification
classes.rationale: Wiring class; composes only

classes.name: MobileBertForQuestionAnswering
classes.rationale: Wiring class; composes only

classes.name: MobileBertForMultipleChoice
classes.rationale: Wiring class; composes only

classes.name: MobileBertForTokenClassification
classes.rationale: Wiring class; composes only

classes.name: MobileNetV1ConvLayer
classes.rationale: Conv2d (with optional groups for depthwise) + optional BatchNorm2d + optional ACT2FN. The activation comes from L1/<act>.py (e.g. relu6). No fused kb-nano L2 wrapper for the standard conv-bn-act stem

classes.name: MobileNetV1Model
classes.rationale: Wiring class: conv_stem + 26 ConvLayers + AdaptiveAvgPool2d; composes only

classes.name: MobileNetV1ForImageClassification
classes.rationale: Wiring class with dropout + Linear classifier; composes only

classes.name: MobileNetV2ConvLayer
classes.rationale: Conv2d (with groups+dilation) + optional BatchNorm2d + optional ACT2FN (relu6); decomposes to conv2d + batch_norm2d + activation

classes.name: MobileNetV2InvertedResidual
classes.rationale: Wiring class: expand_1x1 + depthwise conv_3x3 + reduce_1x1 with optional residual. Compose-only over MobileNetV2ConvLayer. No specialized kb-nano L2 file (closest analogues exist for efficientnetv2 but this is a different block)

classes.name: MobileNetV2Stem
classes.rationale: Wiring class: first_conv + optional expand_1x1 + conv_3x3 + reduce_1x1; composes only

classes.name: MobileNetV2Model
classes.rationale: Wiring class: stem + 16 InvertedResidual + conv_1x1 + AdaptiveAvgPool2d; composes only

classes.name: MobileNetV2ForImageClassification
classes.rationale: Wiring class with classifier; composes only

classes.name: MobileNetV2DeepLabV3Plus
classes.rationale: Wiring class: AvgPool + 1x1 convs + interpolate + concat + classifier; composes only

classes.name: MobileNetV2ForSemanticSegmentation
classes.rationale: Wiring class: backbone + segmentation_head; composes only

mobilenetv4.skip_reason: Folder mobilenetv4 does not exist in /tmp/hf_transformers_pinned/src/transformers/models/ (kb-nano has its own mobilenetv4 implementation but no HF source pinned at this commit)

classes.name: MobileViTConvLayer
classes.rationale: Conv2d (with groups+dilation) + optional BatchNorm2d (eps=1e-5, default momentum) + optional ACT2FN; decomposes to conv2d + batch_norm2d + activation

classes.name: MobileViTInvertedResidual
classes.rationale: Wiring: expand_1x1 + conv_3x3 (depthwise) + reduce_1x1 with optional residual; composes only

classes.name: MobileViTMobileNetLayer
classes.rationale: Wiring: stack of MobileViTInvertedResidual; composes only

classes.name: MobileViTSelfAttention
classes.rationale: Standard non-causal MHA with separate q/k/v Linear, manual scaled-dot SDPA, dropout. L2/clip_attention.py implements the same Q/K/V Linear + manual SDPA + out_proj pattern (although here the o_proj lives in MobileViTSelfOutput)

classes.name: MobileViTSelfOutput
classes.rationale: Linear + dropout; decomposes to L1/linear

classes.name: MobileViTAttention
classes.rationale: Wiring: MobileViTSelfAttention + MobileViTSelfOutput; the o_proj of standard MHA is split between the two children

classes.name: MobileViTIntermediate
classes.rationale: Linear -> ACT2FN; matches L2/encoder_mlp.py:EncoderIntermediate (Linear+GELU)

classes.name: MobileViTOutput
classes.rationale: Linear + dropout + residual add (no LayerNorm); decomposes to L1/linear

classes.name: MobileViTTransformerLayer
classes.rationale: Wiring: layernorm_before -> attention -> residual -> layernorm_after -> intermediate -> output -> residual

classes.name: MobileViTTransformer
classes.rationale: Wiring: stack of MobileViTTransformerLayer; composes only

classes.name: MobileViTLayer
classes.rationale: Wiring: optional downsample + conv_kxk + conv_1x1 + unfold(patches) + transformer + LayerNorm + fold + conv_projection + fusion; composes only

classes.name: MobileViTEncoder
classes.rationale: Wiring: stack of MobileViTMobileNetLayer + MobileViTLayer; composes only

classes.name: MobileViTModel
classes.rationale: Wiring class: conv_stem + encoder + optional pooling; composes only

classes.name: MobileViTForImageClassification
classes.rationale: Wiring class with classifier; composes only

classes.name: MobileViTASPPPooling
classes.rationale: Wiring: AvgPool + ConvLayer + interpolate; composes only

classes.name: MobileViTASPP
classes.rationale: Wiring: parallel ConvLayers with different dilations + ASPPPooling + concat; composes only

classes.name: MobileViTDeepLabV3
classes.rationale: Wiring: ASPP + classifier; composes only

classes.name: MobileViTForSemanticSegmentation
classes.rationale: Wiring class: backbone + segmentation head; composes only

classes.name: MobileViTV2ConvLayer
classes.rationale: Conv2d + BatchNorm2d + ACT2FN; same as v1 with dilation. Decomposes to L1 conv2d + batch_norm2d + activation

classes.name: MobileViTV2InvertedResidual
classes.rationale: Wiring: expand_1x1 + depthwise conv_3x3 + reduce_1x1 with optional residual; composes only

classes.name: MobileViTV2MobileNetLayer
classes.rationale: Wiring: stack of inverted residuals; composes only

classes.name: MobileViTV2LinearSelfAttention
classes.rationale: Linear-complexity self-attention via 1x1 conv qkv_proj producing [1, embed, embed] split, softmax(query) along patch dim, key*context_scores, sum, ReLU(value)*context, out 1x1 conv. Distinct from any kb-nano attention kernel; decomposes to L1/conv2d + L1/softmax + L1/relu + tensor ops

classes.name: MobileViTV2FFN
classes.rationale: 1x1 conv + activation + dropout + 1x1 conv + dropout (no BatchNorm); decomposes to conv2d + activation

classes.name: MobileViTV2TransformerLayer
classes.rationale: Wiring: GroupNorm -> attention -> residual -> GroupNorm -> ffn -> residual; composes only (GroupNorm is L1/group_norm.py)

classes.name: MobileViTV2Transformer
classes.rationale: Wiring: stack of MobileViTV2TransformerLayer; composes only

classes.name: MobileViTV2Layer
classes.rationale: Wiring: optional downsample + conv_kxk + conv_1x1 + transformer + GroupNorm + conv_projection; composes only

classes.name: MobileViTV2Encoder
classes.rationale: Wiring: stack of MobileNetLayer + MobileViTV2Layer; composes only

classes.name: MobileViTV2Model
classes.rationale: Wiring class: conv_stem + encoder; composes only

classes.name: MobileViTV2ForImageClassification
classes.rationale: Wiring class with classifier; composes only

classes.name: MobileViTV2ASPPPooling
classes.rationale: Wiring: AvgPool + ConvLayer + interpolate; composes only

classes.name: MobileViTV2ASPP
classes.rationale: Wiring: parallel dilated convs + ASPPPooling + concat; composes only

classes.name: MobileViTV2DeepLabV3
classes.rationale: Wiring: ASPP + classifier; composes only

classes.name: MobileViTV2ForSemanticSegmentation
classes.rationale: Wiring class: backbone + segmentation head; composes only

inheritance_summary: MobileViTV2LinearSelfAttention(nn.Module - linear-complexity attention, distinct from standard MHA)

classes.name: ModernBertEmbeddings
classes.rationale: tok_embeddings (nn.Embedding) + LayerNorm(eps, bias=norm_bias) + dropout. No position/token_type embeddings (uses RoPE later). Decomposes to L1/embedding + L1/layer_norm

classes.name: ModernBertMLP
classes.rationale: GLU MLP: Wi -> chunk(2) -> act(input)*gate -> Wo. This is the SwiGLU pattern used by L2/llama_mlp.py (MergedColumnParallel + SiluAndMul + RowParallel) when activation is silu/gelu

classes.name: ModernBertRotaryEmbedding
classes.rationale: Standard RoPE inv_freq computation; cos/sin generated outside attention. L1/rotary_emb.py implements the apply step

classes.name: ModernBertAttention
classes.rationale: Non-causal bidirectional self-attention with fused Wqkv (3 * head_dim * num_heads), separate Wo, optional sliding_window, applies RoPE. Closest L2/encoder_attention.py:EncoderSelfAttention (BERT-pattern) is bidirectional but has separate q/k/v; ModernBert uses fused Wqkv and adds RoPE which is unique. Best partial fit; could also decompose to L1/linear + L1/rotary_emb + L1/dense_attention

classes.name: ModernBertEncoderLayer
classes.rationale: Wiring: attn_norm (Identity for layer 0) -> attn -> residual -> mlp_norm -> mlp -> residual

classes.name: ModernBertModel
classes.rationale: Wiring class: embeddings + layers + final LayerNorm + rotary_emb (per layer-type); composes only

classes.name: ModernBertPredictionHead
classes.rationale: Linear -> ACT2FN -> LayerNorm; decomposes to L1 ops

classes.name: ModernBertForMaskedLM
classes.rationale: Wiring class with decoder Linear; composes only

classes.name: ModernBertForSequenceClassification
classes.rationale: Wiring class; composes only

classes.name: ModernBertForTokenClassification
classes.rationale: Wiring class; composes only

classes.name: ModernBertForQuestionAnswering
classes.rationale: Wiring class; composes only

classes.name: ModernBertForMultipleChoice
classes.rationale: Wiring class; composes only

classes.name: ModernBertDecoderEmbeddings
classes.rationale: Inherits ModernBertEmbeddings (tok_emb + LayerNorm + dropout)

classes.name: ModernBertDecoderMLP
classes.rationale: Inherits ModernBertMLP (GLU/SwiGLU pattern)

classes.name: ModernBertDecoderRotaryEmbedding
classes.rationale: Inherits ModernBertRotaryEmbedding -> Gemma3RotaryEmbedding (standard RoPE)

classes.name: ModernBertDecoderAttention
classes.rationale: Causal self-attention with separate q_proj/k_proj/v_proj/Wo (NOTE: explicitly different from ModernBert which fuses Wqkv), RoPE, optional sliding_window, KV cache. L2/attention.py:LlamaAttention covers this standard causal-attention pattern (uses fused QKVParallelLinear which is the deployed form)

classes.name: ModernBertDecoderLayer
classes.rationale: Wiring: attn_norm -> attn -> residual -> mlp_norm -> mlp -> residual

classes.name: ModernBertDecoderPredictionHead
classes.rationale: Linear -> ACT2FN -> LayerNorm

classes.name: ModernBertDecoderModel
classes.rationale: Wiring class: embeddings + layers + final LayerNorm + rotary_emb; composes only

classes.name: ModernBertDecoderForCausalLM
classes.rationale: Wiring class with lm_head; composes only

classes.name: ModernBertDecoderForSequenceClassification
classes.rationale: Wiring class; composes only

classes.name: ModernVBertConnector
classes.rationale: Pixel shuffle (pure tensor reshape/permute - no kernel) + nn.Linear modality_projection. Compute is the Linear; the pixel-shuffle is data shuffling

classes.name: ModernVBertModel
classes.rationale: Wiring class: connector + text_model (ModernBert) + vision_model (SigLIP); composes only

classes.name: ModernVBertPredictionHead
classes.rationale: Linear -> ACT2FN -> LayerNorm (inherited)

classes.name: ModernVBertForMaskedLM
classes.rationale: Wiring class with lm_head; composes only

classes.name: ModernVBertForSequenceClassification
classes.rationale: Wiring class; composes only

classes.name: ModernVBertForTokenClassification
classes.rationale: Wiring class; composes only

classes.name: MoonshineEncoderMLP
classes.rationale: fc1 -> ACT2FN -> fc2 (no SwiGLU, encoder side). L2/whisper_mlp.py implements ColumnParallel+GELU+RowParallel; same fc1+act+fc2 pattern (with bias)

classes.name: MoonshineDecoderMLP
classes.rationale: fc1 -> chunk(2) -> act(gate) * up -> fc2. SwiGLU pattern; matches L2/llama_mlp.py (MergedColumnParallel+SiluAndMul+RowParallel)

classes.name: MoonshineRotaryEmbedding
classes.rationale: Standard RoPE (inherits GlmRotaryEmbedding which is Llama-family)

classes.name: MoonshineAttention
classes.rationale: Multi-head attention used in encoder/decoder/cross variants depending on is_causal flag and key_value_states. L2/whisper_attention.py defines the three sibling classes (WhisperEncoderSelfAttention, WhisperDecoderSelfAttention, WhisperCrossAttention) that match Moonshine's three usage modes; Moonshine adds GQA + RoPE + optional head_dim padding which differ slightly

classes.name: MoonshineEncoderLayer
classes.rationale: Wiring class: input_layernorm -> self_attn -> residual -> post_attention_layernorm -> mlp -> residual

classes.name: MoonshineDecoderLayer
classes.rationale: Wiring class: input_layernorm -> self_attn -> residual -> [optional cross-attn block] -> final_layernorm -> mlp -> residual

classes.name: MoonshineEncoder
classes.rationale: Wiring class but DOES include compute: 3 nn.Conv1d audio frontend + GroupNorm + Tanh/GELU + LayerNorm + rotary_emb + stack of EncoderLayers. Conv1d frontend uses L1/conv1d.py

classes.name: MoonshineDecoder
classes.rationale: Wiring class: embed_tokens + layers + final LayerNorm; composes only

classes.name: MoonshineModel
classes.rationale: Wiring class: encoder + decoder; composes only

classes.name: MoonshineForConditionalGeneration
classes.rationale: Wiring class with proj_out lm_head; composes only

classes.name: MoonshineStreamingFrameCMVN
classes.rationale: Per-frame mean+RMS normalization (custom). Decomposes to elementwise mean/rsqrt/multiply (tensor_ops) but no specialized kb-nano kernel

classes.name: MoonshineStreamingAsinhCompression
classes.rationale: torch.asinh(exp(log_k)*x); pure elementwise nonlinearity, no specialized kb-nano kernel

classes.name: MoonshineStreamingCausalConv1d
classes.rationale: Causal Conv1d (left-pad then standard conv1d) plus mask handling. L1/causal_conv1d.py implements the fused causal conv pattern (Mamba-style); L1/conv1d.py covers the underlying nn.Conv1d

classes.name: MoonshineStreamingLayerNorm
classes.rationale: nn.LayerNorm(elementwise_affine=False) followed by gamma scale (with optional unit offset). L1/layer_norm.py covers the LayerNorm; the gamma multiply is elementwise

classes.name: MoonshineStreamingEncoderMLP
classes.rationale: Inherits MoonshineEncoderMLP (fc1 + act + fc2)

classes.name: MoonshineStreamingEncoderAttention
classes.rationale: Non-causal MHA with separate q/k/v/o (with bias), GQA, no RoPE. Closest fit is L2/whisper_attention.py:WhisperEncoderSelfAttention (non-causal varlen). Note this differs from MoonshineAttention (the parent uses RoPE; this child does not)

classes.name: MoonshineStreamingEncoderLayer
classes.rationale: Wiring class: same shape as parent but uses StreamingEncoderAttention/MLP/LayerNorm

classes.name: MoonshineStreamingEncoderEmbedder
classes.rationale: Wiring of frontend: CMVN + AsinhCompression + Linear + silu + 2 CausalConv1d + silu. Decomposes to L1/conv1d + L1/linear + L1/silu

classes.name: MoonshineStreamingEncoder
classes.rationale: Wiring class: embedder + layers + final_norm; composes only

classes.name: MoonshinMoonshineStreamingDecoderMLP
classes.rationale: Inherits LlamaMLP (SwiGLU)

classes.name: MoonshineStreamingDecoder
classes.rationale: Wiring class: adds pos_emb + optional proj before parent decoder; composes only

classes.name: MoonshineStreamingModel
classes.rationale: Wiring class; composes only

classes.name: MoonshineStreamingForConditionalGeneration
classes.rationale: Wiring class with proj_out; composes only

classes.name: MoshiRMSNorm
classes.rationale: Standard Llama-family RMSNorm: weight * (x * rsqrt(mean(x^2)+eps))

classes.name: MoshiFlexibleLinear
classes.rationale: Per-codebook stacked Linear: select weight by layer_idx then batched matmul. L1/bmm.py covers the batched matmul; this is a custom layout (no fused kb-nano file)

classes.name: MoshiLinear
classes.rationale: Wraps nn.Linear OR MoshiFlexibleLinear depending on use_flexible_linear. The non-flexible case is L1/linear.py; flexible case decomposes to L1/bmm.py

classes.name: MoshiRotaryEmbedding
classes.rationale: Standard Llama RoPE inv_freq table; L1/rotary_emb.py applies it

classes.name: MoshiGatingMLP
classes.rationale: fc1 (size ffn_dim, 2*latent) -> chunk(2) act(gate)*up -> fc2. SwiGLU pattern matches L2/llama_mlp.py. When use_flexible_linear is True, fc1/fc2 become MoshiFlexibleLinear so the inner Linear becomes BMM

classes.name: MoshiAttention
classes.rationale: Causal multi-head attention with GQA, optional RoPE, separate q/k/v/o (wrapped in MoshiLinear). L2/attention.py:LlamaAttention covers the Linear + RoPE + paged-attention path (the FlexibleLinear codebook variant requires per-codebook BMM and is not directly in L2/attention.py)

classes.name: MoshiFlashAttention2
classes.rationale: Same compute as MoshiAttention but routes through flash-attn instead of manual SDPA; L2/attention.py uses flash-attention internally

classes.name: MoshiSdpaAttention
classes.rationale: Same compute as MoshiAttention but routes through torch SDPA; L2/attention.py covers

classes.name: MoshiDecoderLayer
classes.rationale: Wiring class: input_layernorm -> self_attn -> residual -> post_attention_layernorm -> mlp (optional flexible) -> residual

classes.name: MoshiDepthDecoder
classes.rationale: Wiring class: text_embed_tokens + 7 audio embed_tokens + layers + RMSNorm + depth-specific output proj; composes only

classes.name: MoshiModel
classes.rationale: Wiring class: embed_tokens + layers + RMSNorm; composes only

classes.name: MoshiForCausalLM
classes.rationale: Wiring class with lm_head; composes only

classes.name: MoshiForConditionalGeneration
classes.rationale: Wiring class joining MoshiModel + MoshiDepthDecoder + audio_encoder; composes only

inheritance_summary: MoshiAttention(nn.Module - causal MHA with GQA + flexible per-codebook linears)
MoshiGatingMLP(nn.Module - SwiGLU with optional per-codebook FlexibleLinear)

classes.name: MPNetEmbeddings
classes.rationale: word_embeddings + position_embeddings (no token_type) + LayerNorm + dropout. L2/encoder_embeddings.py:EncoderEmbeddingsBase handles BERT-pattern embedding+LayerNorm (token_type can be 0/missing)

classes.name: MPNetSelfAttention
classes.rationale: BERT-style non-causal MHA with separate q/k/v/o Linear, manual scaled-dot SDPA + relative position bias added to scores. L2/encoder_attention.py:EncoderSelfAttention matches the Q/K/V/SDPA pattern (relative position bias is added externally)

classes.name: MPNetAttention
classes.rationale: Wiring around MPNetSelfAttention with post LayerNorm(dropout(attn) + residual)

classes.name: MPNetIntermediate
classes.rationale: BERT pattern: Linear + ACT2FN. L2/encoder_mlp.py:EncoderIntermediate matches

classes.name: MPNetOutput
classes.rationale: BERT pattern: Linear + dropout + LayerNorm(out + residual). L2/encoder_mlp.py:EncoderOutput matches

classes.name: MPNetLayer
classes.rationale: Wiring class: attention + intermediate + output; composes only

classes.name: MPNetEncoder
classes.rationale: Wiring class but contains relative_attention_bias nn.Embedding (which produces position_bias added to scores). L1/embedding.py covers the embedding lookup

classes.name: MPNetPooler
classes.rationale: First-token select + Linear + tanh

classes.name: MPNetModel
classes.rationale: Wiring class: embeddings + encoder + pooler; composes only

classes.name: MPNetForMaskedLM
classes.rationale: Wiring class with LM head; composes only

classes.name: MPNetLMHead
classes.rationale: Linear -> GELU -> LayerNorm -> Linear (decoder). Decomposes to L1 ops

classes.name: MPNetForSequenceClassification
classes.rationale: Wiring class; composes only

classes.name: MPNetForMultipleChoice
classes.rationale: Wiring class; composes only

classes.name: MPNetForTokenClassification
classes.rationale: Wiring class; composes only

classes.name: MPNetClassificationHead
classes.rationale: Linear -> tanh -> dropout -> Linear; two-layer classifier

classes.name: MPNetForQuestionAnswering
classes.rationale: Wiring class with QA outputs; composes only

inheritance_summary: MPNetIntermediate(nn.Module - BERT-style Linear+ACT2FN, copied from BertIntermediate)
MPNetOutput(nn.Module - BERT-style Linear+LayerNorm, copied from BertOutput)

classes.name: MptAttention
classes.rationale: Causal MHA with fused Wqkv (3*hidden), separate out_proj, ALiBi position bias added to scores (no RoPE), optional clip_qkv, manual scaled-dot SDPA. No exact L2 wrapper matches: L2/attention.py uses RoPE not ALiBi, and there is no kb-nano file for ALiBi-positioned attention. Best decomposes to L1/linear (qkv+o), manual scaled matmul, softmax, attention KV cache update

classes.name: MptMLP
classes.rationale: up_proj -> GELU(approximate=none) -> down_proj + residual + dropout. Two-layer FFN (not SwiGLU); structurally matches L2/encoder_mlp.py pattern (Linear+GELU+Linear). Note no LayerNorm is included here

classes.name: MptBlock
classes.rationale: Wiring class: norm_1 -> attn -> dropout-residual -> norm_2 -> ffn(with internal residual); composes only

classes.name: MptModel
classes.rationale: Wiring class: wte (token embedding) + blocks + final norm_f; composes only

classes.name: MptForCausalLM
classes.rationale: Wiring class with lm_head; composes only

classes.name: MptForSequenceClassification
classes.rationale: Wiring class; composes only

classes.name: MptForTokenClassification
classes.rationale: Wiring class; composes only

classes.name: MptForQuestionAnswering
classes.rationale: Wiring class; composes only

inheritance_summary: MptAttention(nn.Module - causal MHA with ALiBi (no RoPE), fused Wqkv)

classes.name: MraSampledDenseMatMul
classes.rationale: Custom autograd Function wrapping mra_cuda_kernel.mm_to_sparse / sparse_dense_mm. Needs custom MRA CUDA kernel from kernels-community; not in kb-nano

classes.name: MraSparseDenseMatMul
classes.rationale: Custom autograd Function wrapping mra_cuda_kernel.sparse_dense_mm. Needs custom MRA CUDA kernel from kernels-community; not in kb-nano

classes.name: MraReduceSum
classes.rationale: Helper class for sparse reduction tied to MRA CUDA kernel; needs custom MRA CUDA kernel from kernels-community; not in kb-nano

classes.name: MraEmbeddings
classes.rationale: Standard BERT embeddings: word + position + token_type + LayerNorm + dropout. L2/encoder_embeddings.py:EncoderEmbeddingsBase matches

classes.name: MraSelfAttention
classes.rationale: Multi-resolution attention dispatching mra2_attention which calls mra_cuda_kernel.{index_max, mm_to_sparse, sparse_dense_mm}. Needs custom MRA CUDA kernel from kernels-community; not in kb-nano. Q/K/V Linear projections do map to L1/linear but the attention core is unsupported

classes.name: MraSelfOutput
classes.rationale: Linear + dropout + LayerNorm(out+residual); BERT-pattern, copied from Bert

classes.name: MraAttention
classes.rationale: Wiring around MraSelfAttention + MraSelfOutput; composes only (the MRA CUDA dependency is in self.self)

classes.name: MraIntermediate
classes.rationale: BERT-style Linear+ACT2FN; copied from Bert

classes.name: MraOutput
classes.rationale: BERT-style Linear+LayerNorm; copied from Bert

classes.name: MraLayer
classes.rationale: Wiring class: attention + intermediate + output (with chunked feed-forward); composes only

classes.name: MraEncoder
classes.rationale: Wiring class: stack of MraLayer; composes only

classes.name: MraPredictionHeadTransform
classes.rationale: Linear + ACT2FN + LayerNorm

classes.name: MraLMPredictionHead
classes.rationale: Wiring class with transform + decoder Linear; composes only

classes.name: MraOnlyMLMHead
classes.rationale: Wiring class; composes only

classes.name: MraModel
classes.rationale: Wiring class: embeddings + encoder + pooler; composes only

classes.name: MraForMaskedLM
classes.rationale: Wiring class with MLM head; composes only

classes.name: MraClassificationHead
classes.rationale: Two-layer classifier: Linear -> tanh -> Linear

classes.name: MraForSequenceClassification
classes.rationale: Wiring class; composes only

classes.name: MraForMultipleChoice
classes.rationale: Wiring class; composes only

classes.name: MraForTokenClassification
classes.rationale: Wiring class; composes only

classes.name: MraForQuestionAnswering
classes.rationale: Wiring class; composes only

classes.name: MT5LayerNorm
classes.rationale: T5-style LayerNorm: weight * x * rsqrt(mean(x^2)+eps), no bias, no centering. L1/t5_layer_norm.py is the canonical match

classes.name: MT5DenseActDense
classes.rationale: Linear -> ACT2FN -> dropout -> Linear (no gating). L2/t5_dense.py:T5DenseActDense matches

classes.name: MT5DenseGatedActDense
classes.rationale: Two parallel Linear (wi_0/wi_1) -> ACT2FN(wi_0)*wi_1 -> dropout -> Linear. L2/t5_dense.py:T5DenseGatedActDense matches (uses MergedColumnParallelLinear which is functionally equivalent)

classes.name: MT5LayerFF
classes.rationale: Wiring class: T5LayerNorm -> Dense{Gated}ActDense -> dropout -> residual

classes.name: MT5Attention
classes.rationale: T5 attention: separate q/k/v/o Linear, manual scaled-dot SDPA + relative_attention_bias added as position_bias, supports both self and cross attention. L2/t5_attention.py:T5SelfAttention covers the encoder self-attention path; the cross-attention and decoder-causal paths are not in kb-nano (kb-nano T5 implementation is encoder-only). For the cross-attn decoder use case this would decompose to L1/linear + L1/bmm + L1/softmax + L1/embedding (relative bias)

classes.name: MT5LayerSelfAttention
classes.rationale: Wiring class: T5LayerNorm -> MT5Attention -> dropout -> residual

classes.name: MT5LayerCrossAttention
classes.rationale: Wiring class: T5LayerNorm -> MT5Attention(cross) -> dropout -> residual; the underlying compute decomposes to L1 (no kb-nano cross-attention file for T5)

classes.name: MT5Block
classes.rationale: Wiring class: SelfAttn + optional CrossAttn (decoder) + LayerFF; composes only

classes.name: MT5ClassificationHead
classes.rationale: Linear -> tanh -> dropout -> Linear

classes.name: MT5Stack
classes.rationale: Wiring class: embed_tokens + blocks + final layer norm; composes only

classes.name: MT5Model
classes.rationale: Wiring class: encoder + decoder; composes only

classes.name: MT5ForConditionalGeneration
classes.rationale: Wiring class with lm_head; composes only

classes.name: MT5EncoderModel
classes.rationale: Wiring class encoder-only; composes only

classes.name: MT5ForSequenceClassification
classes.rationale: Wiring class; composes only

classes.name: MT5ForTokenClassification
classes.rationale: Wiring class; composes only

classes.name: MT5ForQuestionAnswering
classes.rationale: Wiring class; composes only

classes.name: MusicgenSinusoidalPositionalEmbedding
classes.rationale: Sinusoidal positional embedding with weights buffer indexed by position_ids. L1/sinusoidal_embed.py is for pi0 timestep embeddings (different signature). No exact kb-nano file; decomposes to a buffer + index_select

classes.name: MusicgenAttention
classes.rationale: Bart-family attention: separate q/k/v/o (with bias), supports both self-attention (causal in decoder) and cross-attention (key_value_states), uses EncoderDecoderCache. L2/whisper_attention.py defines the analogous WhisperDecoderSelfAttention + WhisperCrossAttention pattern (same self/cross split with paged KV cache). Per project guidelines: Bart-family encoder-decoder attention decomposes to L1; the WhisperAttention sibling classes are the closest L2 matches

classes.name: MusicgenDecoderLayer
classes.rationale: Wiring class: self_attn_layer_norm -> self_attn -> residual -> encoder_attn_layer_norm -> encoder_attn -> residual -> final_layer_norm -> fc1 -> ACT2FN -> fc2 -> residual

classes.name: MusicgenDecoder
classes.rationale: Wiring class: per-codebook embed_tokens + sinusoidal pos emb + layers + LayerNorm; composes only

classes.name: MusicgenModel
classes.rationale: Wiring class: decoder; composes only

classes.name: MusicgenForCausalLM
classes.rationale: Wiring class with per-codebook lm_heads; composes only

classes.name: MusicgenForConditionalGeneration
classes.rationale: Wiring class joining text encoder + audio encoder + Musicgen decoder; composes only

inheritance_summary: MusicgenAttention(nn.Module - Bart-family attention with self+cross modes)
